name: MEGASync – Startup Autorun Entry
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts for commonly abused tools with specific registry footprints: PsExec (temporary service key on target), FileZilla (FTP exfiltration), MEGASync (cloud exfiltration with autorun), Advanced IP Scanner (writes even as portable; operational history including scanned IP ranges), and NetSupport Manager (RMM abused as RAT). Includes artifact tips and companion file artifacts.
description: [MEGASync] MEGASync registers itself in the user Run key as 'MEGAsync' to start automatically at logon. Value points to MEGAsync.exe in %LocalAppData%\MEGAsync\.
forensic_value: Proves MEGASync was installed and configured for persistence. Run key LastWrite timestamp indicates when MEGASync was first configured. The autorun value name 'MEGAsync' is a specific IOC — search Run keys for this value name.
